message:
test(wave-27): add 18 tests for task_handle + graceful shutdown types

runtime/task_handle.rs: 9 tests covering JoinError Debug/Clone/Eq/
std::error::Error, TaskHandle Debug, try_join for not-ready/ready/
closed-channel cases.

signal/graceful.rs: 9 tests covering GracefulOutcome Debug/Clone+Copy/
Eq, GracefulConfig Debug/Clone/Default values, GracePeriodGuard Debug/
duration/started_at accessors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
